content_body: Lovely time that went by too quickly! Thoroughly enjoyed the cabin plus surrounding area. If you're driving to see the suspension bridge - the Swinging Bridge, the gravel road is easy to miss. Once on it, the 3 miles is very slow going, but the bridge was cool if you are into that! No Bigfoot sightings, but we did see a beaver!
title: Relaxing Getaway to the Blue Ridge Mountains
